name: AMOS Group Limited
summary: AMOS Group Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and supplies rigging and lifting equipment for offshore oil and gas, and marine industries worldwide. The company operates through Offshore and Marine segments. It offers a range of engineering services, such as the customized design, fabrication, production, testing of lifting and mooring equipment. The company also provides load testing, spooling, and rental services, as well as holds inventory of products, including heavy lift slings, wire ropes, crane wires, and mooring equipment. The company was formerly known as Gaylin Holdings Limited and changed its name to AMOS Group Limited in November 2018. AMOS Group Limited was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Singapore.
